@if (inventory()) {

Inventory Details

{{inventory()!.sku}}

Status

{{ inventory()!.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive' }}

Available Quantity

{{ inventory()!.availableQuantity }}

Reserved Quantity

{{ inventory()!.reservedQuantity }}

Product Variant ID

#{{ inventory()!.productVariantId }}

Inventory Information

Inventory ID #{{ inventory()!.inventoryId }}
Address ID #{{ inventory()!.addressId }}
SKU {{ inventory()!.sku }}

Warehouse Address

Phone {{ inventory()!.contactPhoneNumber }}
Address {{ inventory()!.addressLine }}
City {{ inventory()!.city }}
State {{ inventory()!.state }}
Country {{ inventory()!.country }}
PIN Code {{ inventory()!.pinCode }}
}
